ingredients_text: Supermalt Bread (38%) (Wheat Flour (with added Calcium, Iron, Niacin & Thiamine), Water, Barley Malt Flour, Millet, Sunflower Seeds, Yeast, Sugar, Salt, Wheat Gluten, Emulsifier (Mono - and Diacetyltartaric Acid Esters of Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids), Soya Flour, Preservative (Calcium Propanoate), Sugar, Rapeseed Oil, Flour Treatment Agent (Ascorbic Acid), Acidity Regulator (Sodium Hydroxide), Enzyme, Stabiliser (Xanthan Gum), Anti Caking Agent (Sodium Ferrocyanide)), Egg Mayonnaise (26%) {Egg, Mayonnaise (Rapeseed Oil, Water, Pasteurised Liquid Egg, Acidity Regulators (Acetic Acid, Citric Acid), Sugar, Salt, Modified Maize Starch, Spice (Mustard), Stabilisers (Xanthan Gum, Guar Gum), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate)), Egg (26%)[Egg, Water, Citric Acid and Trisodium Citrate], Rocket (5%), Mayonnaise (5%)(Rapeseed Oil, Water, Pasteurised Liquid Egg, Acidity Regulators (Acetic Acid, Citric Acid), Sugar, Salt, Modified Maize Starch, Spice (Mustard), Stabilisers (Xanthan Gum, Guar Gum), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate)}, Black Pepper (1%).
